CVE-2014-8501.title: The _bfd_XXi_swap_aouthdr_in function in bfd/peXXigen.c in GNU bi ...
CVE-2014-8501.description: The _bfd_XXi_swap_aouthdr_in function in bfd/peXXigen.c in GNU binutils 2.24 and earlier allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (out-of-bounds write) and possibly have other unspecified impact via a crafted NumberOfRvaAndSizes field in the AOUT header in a PE executable.
